facts.subject: brain_page_graph

must_preserve: Migration script with valid_to column is complete
User is undecided on pricing (proposed $19/$49 but considering)
Sara is the designer, returning from vacation tomorrow, will review brain page
Graph layout has a bug — nodes clustered at corners, FE agent assigned
User's sister's birthday is May 15; reminder set for May 13
may_drop: the alternate pricing the assistant suggested ($49/$99/$200)
expected_failure_modes: Topic-shift conversations are the canonical compaction stress test — early facts (migration done) often lost when later facts (sister's birthday) dominate
Personal facts (sister's birthday) sometimes get sterilized into 'has reminders set'
Pricing UNDECIDED is a state, not a value — compaction may emit a value as if decided
Negative/conditional facts (still undecided) often summarized as positive
